title: StepScore
description: A single per-step human verdict. Produced by the dashboard or `eval-kit review`. Stitched onto a Run by mergeScores() to produce a ScoredRun.

tool_match.description: Mirror of the auto-scored tool_match. Carried forward into the score so consumers don't need to join back to the Run.

dimensions.description: Per-dimension 0-3 score. Keys must be Dimension enum values; not every dimension is present.

reviewer_id.description: Identifier for the human reviewer. v0.4 multi-reviewer schema will extend this with `ReviewerAgreement`.

pre_filled.description: True if the score was drafted by an LLM pre-fill and not yet overridden. Any human edit MUST flip this to false.

pre_fill_confidence.description: Confidence the pre-fill model assigned. Only populated when pre_filled=true. Used by tier-3 active triage to surface low-confidence drafts.
